page_metadata.biotools__summary: Graphical representation of the Feb 2010 KEGG Orthology. The KEGG orthology is a set of pathway IDs that are not to be confused with the KEGG ortholog IDs.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Graphical representation of the Feb 2010 KEGG Orthology. The KEGG orthology is a set of pathway IDs that are not to be confused with the KEGG ortholog IDs.
